---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Shows — The Hamstrings"
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="content-page">
  <h1 style="text-align:center; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:2rem;">Shows</h1>

  <div class="upcoming-section">
    <h2>Upcoming</h2>
    <p style="text-align:center; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">More shows coming soon… check back!</p>
  </div>

  <!-- To add a show, copy a show-card block and fill in the details: -->
  <!--
  <div class="show-card">
    <div class="show-date">
      <div class="month">JUN</div>
      <div class="day">15</div>
      <div class="year">2026</div>
    </div>
    <div class="show-details">
      <h3>Venue Name</h3>
      <p class="venue-info">City, GA</p>
      <p class="show-time">9:00 PM</p>
    </div>
    <div class="show-tickets"><a href="https://...">Tickets</a></div>
  </div>
  -->

  <div class="past-shows">
    <h2>Past Shows</h2>

    <div class="show-card">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">MAY</div>
        <div class="day">17</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Kirkwood Spring Fling</h3>
        <p class="venue-info">Atlanta, GA</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">MAR</div>
        <div class="day">14</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Eddie's Attic</h3>
        <p class="venue-info">Decatur, GA</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">JUL</div>
        <div class="day">6</div>
        <div class="year">2024</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Mellow Mushroom</h3>
        <p class="venue-info">Atlanta, GA</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">APR</div>
        <div class="day">29</div>
        <div class="year">2023</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Inman Park Wine Stroll</h3>
        <p class="venue-info">Atlanta, GA</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
